title: fable-forge spec
description: Advisory reference for the STANDARD grade. gates/forge_gate.py is authoritative and grade-aware: LIGHT needs only restated_goal + >=1 runnable acceptance_criteria; STANDARD adds the fields required below; HEAVY additionally requires constraints.architectural, similar_implementations, and >=1 observation at done.

restated_goal.description: Intent + constraint envelope: 'achieve X without violating Y, scoped to Z'. NOT the raw ask verbatim.

non_goals.description: The over-broad version you are NOT doing.

authority_reason.description: the contract/boundary this file owns that the change must satisfy

category.description: non-empty label; recommended: tempting_shortcut | architecture | scope | compatibility (any descriptive label is accepted)

risk.description: a real blast-radius risk; a placeholder (none / n/a / no risks) is rejected by the gate

acceptance_ref.description: required for high/blocking — the acceptance criterion that covers it

value.description: a runnable command or falsifiable check

evidence.description: live output from running verify.value — filled at VERIFY
